untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires multi-candle geometric trend line analysis (higher highs/lows transitioning to lower highs/higher lows forming diamond shape). This cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator values. Requires pattern recognition logic beyond allowed operators. Substituted simplified approximation using downtrend (price below SMA) and volume surge, but this does not capture the true diamond reversal pattern geometry.
translation_notes: Signal requires detection of a complex geometric price pattern with specific trend line formations that cannot be directly translated into indicator-based conditions. The entry conditions use price below 20-period MA as proxy for downtrend context and volume surge as approximation of breakout confirmation. True diamond pattern detection would require candlestick sequence analysis and geometric calculations not supported by the allowed indicator set.
